title: The Hacker Attack
content: The office was unusually quiet when the security team received an alert. Someone had attempted to access the company’s systems using stolen credentials. Although the attack was detected quickly, everyone became concerned about the potential damage. Employees were asked to change their passwords immediately and enable two-factor authentication. For the next several hours, the IT department analyzed logs and monitored network activity. Fortunately, no sensitive information was stolen. The incident served as an important reminder that cybersecurity is not only the responsibility of technical teams. Every employee plays a role in protecting company data through good security habits and constant vigilance.
